Hero.lede: MORVA is Jordan's luxury digital studio — designing and engineering websites, brands, and AI products for ambitious companies that refuse the ordinary.

Intro.label: (01) The Studio
Intro.heading: Jordan's atelier for brands that want to be remembered.
Intro.body: Founded in Amman in 2026. We sit at the intersection of design, engineering, and intelligence. Every site we ship is a bespoke instrument — measured in milliseconds, weighed in detail, finished by hand.

stats.d: No templates. Every project begins from a blank canvas.
AI woven into experience — not bolted on.

Services.label: (02) Services
Services.heading: What we make.
Services.lede: Six disciplines, one studio. We compose them around the problem.

items.d: Editorial layouts, distinctive typography, cinematic motion.
Next.js, performance-first architectures, content systems built to last.
Product interfaces — research, systems, prototypes, ship.
Identity, voice, art direction — the world your work lives in.
Technical SEO, Core Web Vitals, conversion rate work.

Why.label: (04) Why MORVA
Why.heading: We are not an agency. We are an atelier.

points.d: Your work is led and made by senior designers and engineers. No layers.
Kerning, easing curves, contrast ratios — we sweat what others ship.
1–6 day delivery on standard plans. Decisions in days, not weeks.
Clean systems, documented handoffs, code your team can keep growing.

steps.d: We listen. We audit. We surface the real problem and the real ambition.
Strategy, narrative, and a single bold creative direction — defended.
Design system, key screens, motion language, prototype.
QA, analytics, content systems, training — and a clean handover.
Iteration, optimization, growth. We stay close after launch.

items.q: MORVA gave our restaurant a new altitude. The site doesn't just look beautiful — it brings reservations in every day.
The most thoughtful studio we have worked with in Amman. Every detail is intentional.
They shipped something we are genuinely proud to show our guests.
How long does a project take?
items.a: Landing page in 1–2 days. Full website in 3–5 days. Full website + Google Maps in 4–6 days.
Landing pages from 149 JOD. Full websites from 329 JOD. Full website + local SEO from 419 JOD. AI chatbot add-on from 110 JOD.

items.q: Do you work with startups and small businesses?
items.a: Yes — restaurants, cafés, clinics, boutiques, and growing brands across Amman and the Kingdom.
Amman, Jordan — established 2026. We work across the Kingdom and the wider region.

items.q: Do you build on WordPress or Webflow?
items.a: We build production codebases on Next.js for speed, SEO and longevity. We can advise on lower-touch stacks where appropriate.

CTA.label: (08) Let's Begin
CTA.lede: Tell us what you're building. We respond within the hour on WhatsApp.

Footer.tagline: Luxury digital craft, made in Amman.

services.title: Six disciplines. One studio.
services.lede: Strategy, brand, product, and engineering — orchestrated by the people who will actually do the work.

portfolio.title: Selected work.
portfolio.lede: A small, recent cross-section of websites we have crafted. Tap any card to preview the mockups.

caseStudies.title: Inside the work.
caseStudies.lede: Challenge, strategy, design, build, and the outcomes that mattered.

about.title: We are MORVA.
about.lede: A small, senior team in Amman building digital work we are proud to sign — for the most ambitious restaurants, cafés and brands in the Kingdom.

story.b: MORVA was founded in Amman in 2026 by a small team tired of templated, anonymous work. We build small, on purpose. We choose partners, on purpose. Today we are the studio Jordan's most ambitious restaurants, cafés and brands choose when the work has to look world-class.

vision.b: To be the studio every ambitious brand in Jordan and the region chooses when the work has to be world-class — and to prove that craft of this level can be made here.

mission.b: Make digital products of consequence — beautiful, fast, accessible, intelligent — for the businesses that matter to their communities.

values.d: We refuse to ship what we are not proud of.
The people you meet are the people who do the work.
Good ideas survive being explained simply.
We stay. Most of our work is for returning partners.

ai.title: Intelligence, woven in.
ai.lede: AI is not a feature. It is a new material — for content, search, support, and decisioning. We design with it from day one.

items.d: Adaptive content, personalization, semantic search baked into the experience.
Copilots that speak your voice and know your menu, services and policies.
Quietly removing the manual work that slows your team down.
Support, recommendation, and reservations that feel like a concierge.

pricing.title: Ready to elevate your brand?
pricing.lede: Transparent JOD pricing. Delivered in days, not months. Every plan is hand-built by senior designers and engineers — no juniors, no templates.
